results.overview: After losing their university jobs, three parapsychologists start a ghost-catching business in New York City and uncover a supernatural threat that could destroy the world.
results.title: Ghostbusters

results.name: Ghostbusters
results.overview: Jake Kong Jr. and Eddie Spencer Jr. are sons of the original Ghost Busters, and they work alongside Tracy the Gorilla (who also worked with their fathers). Together, they are dedicated to ridding the world of the evil ghost wizard Prime Evil and his cast of henchmen.

Following a ghost invasion of Manhattan, paranormal enthusiasts Erin Gilbert and Abby Yates, nuclear engineer Jillian Holtzmann, and subway worker Patty Tolan band together to stop the otherworldly threat.
results.title: Ghostbusters

results.name: Ghostbusters
results.overview: Set in the 1990s, following Walter Peck's initial run for mayor. Plot TBA

results.name: Extreme Ghostbusters
results.overview: Based on the blockbuster films, this action-packed animated series starts a decade after the original Ghostbusters saved New York City from ghosts, goblins and ghouls. All the guys have left town, except Egon, now teaching a Paranormal Studies class at the local university. But Zuul, the all-powerful demon, has awakened from hibernation to wreak havoc on the unsuspecting masses. Desperate to recruit a new team, Egon and the plucky Janine turn to four of his teenage students: Kylie, a genius with an encyclopedic knowledge of the occult; Eduardo, a hip slacker with a crush on Kylie; Garrett, a wheelchair-bound athlete with a hot temper; and Roland, a “gentle giant” mechanical whiz. It's only a matter of time before Egon, Janine, old pal Slimer and the “kids” band together to rid the city of the evildoers.

results.name: The Real Ghostbusters
results.overview: The continuing adventures of paranormal investigators Dr. Peter Venkman, Dr. Egon Spengler, Dr. Ray Stantz, Winston Zeddemore, their secretary Janine Melnitz and their mascot ghost Slimer.

results.name: Ghostbusters
results.overview: A merciless ghost-killer, capable of possessing his victims, is haunting the city. While everyone around him remains skeptical of the mysticism, ghost hunters take up the case: former investigator Maxim, his strange mute partner, and a 14-year-old teenager named Zhenya, who accidentally joins them.

When single mom Callie and her two kids Trevor and Phoebe arrive in a small Oklahoma town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.
results.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife

results.overview: The discovery of a massive river of ectoplasm and a resurgence of spectral activity allows the staff of Ghostbusters to revive the business.
results.title: Ghostbusters II

results.overview: When the discovery of an ancient artifact unleashes an evil force, Ghostbusters new and old must join forces to protect their home and save the world from a second Ice Age.
results.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire

results.name: Slimer! and the Real Ghostbusters
results.overview: Episodes feature the Ghostbusters as well as their secretary Janine. But the main star of this show is their pet ghost Slimer, who's joined by some new friends and some new enemies.

results.name: Ghostbusters of East Finchley
results.overview: Comedy drama about a tax-fraud investigation.
Documentary Interviews of the director and cast of the original Ghostbusters film
results.title: Ghostbusters 1999

results.original_title: Cleanin' Up the Town: Remembering Ghostbusters
results.overview: The documentary that tells us the full story from where it all started through to the future of the "Ghostbusters" franchise.
results.title: Cleanin' Up the Town: Remembering Ghostbusters

results.overview: Beautiful Wan Wen Zheng plays a ghost bent on revenge. Originally killed while being raped, she gives supernatural fighting powers to a Kung Fu boxer in this atmospheric film.
results.title: Devil and the Ghostbuster

results.overview: Wu Ma stars as a ghost who's searching for the perfect husband for his daughter. In order to get her married, the two decide to leave the spirit plain and head for the land of the living. To their surprise the world had drastically changed since they've last visited. The duo finds a likely candidate in a street hustler. The ghostly pair chase the poor guy until he seeks the help of a tao priest. Will the Tao priest send these wandering spirits back to hell or will the hustler join is ghostly bride forever?
results.title: The Chinese Ghostbuster

results.original_title: Time Is But a Window: Ghostbusters 2 and Beyond
results.title: Time Is But a Window: Ghostbusters 2 and Beyond

results.original_title: On the Scene with the Ghostbusters
results.title: On the Scene with the Ghostbusters

results.original_title: Who You Gonna Call?: A Ghostbusters Retrospective
results.overview: Entertainment Journalist Geoff Boucher sits down with Director Ivan Reitman and Co-Writer/Actor Dan Aykroyd, who recall shooting the original, discussing the role New York City plays in the film, the picture's massive success, the iconic images that arose from the film, Harold Ramis' contributions, the technical details of the shoot, the film's special effects, the cast's contributions to the film's success, music, fan reaction, and more.
results.title: Who You Gonna Call?: A Ghostbusters Retrospective
